mapper.select: SELECT * FROM prescription WHERE visit_id = #{visitId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM prescription WHERE visit_id = #{visitId} AND status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM prescription WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO prescription (rx_no, visit_id, patient_id, staff_id, total_amount, status) VALUES (#{rxNo}, #{visitId}, #{patientId}, #{staffId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE prescription SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE prescription SET status = #{toStatus} WHERE visit_id = #{visitId} AND status = #{fromStatus}
